title: Ireland lags far behind EU peers as digital health record rollout stumbles [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: Ireland has been ranked a "beginner" and "clear outlier" by EU assessors with just five of its 47 public hospitals hold functioning electronic records
summary_public: Ireland has been ranked a "beginner" and "clear outlier" by EU assessors with just five of its 47 public hospitals hold functioning electronic records

IE.label: negative
IE.evidence: Ireland lags far behind EU peers
